# Skill submission / update

**Skill name(s):**
**Plugin:** (mccombs-case-toolkit / business-ai-tools / new plugin)
**Change type:** [ ] New skill  [ ] Update  [ ] Fix

## Author checklist

- [ ] `SKILL.md` frontmatter has `name` (matching the folder) and a specific `description` that says *what* the skill does and *when* to use it
- [ ] All referenced files live **inside** the skill folder (no `../` paths)
- [ ] `metadata.version` bumped for updates
- [ ] No secrets, student data (FERPA), or copyrighted third-party content
- [ ] Attribution/license included if adapted from someone else's work

## Cross-platform test (manual — CI cannot do this part)

The same SKILL.md can behave differently across platforms, so test before first publication:

- [ ] **Claude EDU / Claude app:** uploaded the skill and ran at least one realistic prompt — output correct
- [ ] **ChatGPT (UT workspace):** uploaded the zip and ran the same prompt — output correct, or skill is intentionally Claude-only (explain below)

## Notes for reviewers

<!-- Anything a reviewer should know: what you tested, known limitations, platform caveats -->
